title: 14 backend Cargo.toml: add inventory dep
description:
Add inventory = '0.3' to the [dependencies] section of all 14 backend crate Cargo.toml files so they can call inventory::submit!.

What: Ensure all backend crates have access to the inventory macro for self-registration.

Algorithm:
1. For each of the 14 backend Cargo.toml files, add inventory = '0.3' under [dependencies]:
   - secretx-aws-kms/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-aws-sm/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-aws-ssm/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-azure-kv/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-bitwarden/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-doppler/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-env/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-file/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-gcp-sm/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-hashicorp-vault/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-keyring/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-local-signing/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-pkcs11/Cargo.toml
   - secretx-wolfhsm/Cargo.toml
2. Use the same version as secretx-core (0.3)
3. Consider using workspace inheritance if the workspace Cargo.toml has [workspace.dependencies]

Defensive programming rules:
- Use exact version specifier '0.3' matching secretx-core
- Do not add to [dev-dependencies] — inventory::submit! must be in production code
- No other changes to any Cargo.toml

Agent team: standard (Researcher + Implementer + Validator)
